entries.name: drawio:analyze
entries.intent: Analyze existing diagrams for quality, completeness, and suggest improvements

entries.name: drawio:auto-diagram
entries.intent: Automatically generate the right diagram by analyzing code, PRs, or conversation context

entries.name: drawio:batch
entries.intent: Batch process multiple diagrams - generate, export, update, or analyze in bulk

entries.name: drawio:create
entries.intent: Create a new draw.io diagram with AI-powered type selection and generation

entries.name: drawio:data-bind
entries.intent: Bind diagram elements to live data sources for conditional formatting and dynamic updates

entries.name: drawio:edit
entries.intent: Edit and modify existing draw.io diagrams with intelligent updates

entries.name: drawio:embed
entries.intent: Embed draw.io diagrams into GitHub PRs, wikis, Confluence, Jira, Azure DevOps, Notion, Teams, and Harness

entries.name: drawio:enrich
entries.intent: Enrich and deepen diagrams by analyzing codebases, APIs, and web sources for more granular detail

entries.name: drawio:export
entries.intent: Export draw.io diagrams to SVG, PNG, PDF with embedded editability

entries.name: drawio:layers
entries.intent: Manage diagram layers for complex multi-layered visualizations

entries.name: drawio:mcp-setup
entries.intent: Configure draw.io MCP servers for AI-powered diagramming

entries.name: drawio:open
entries.intent: Open draw.io diagrams in the desktop application or browser editor

entries.name: drawio:style
entries.intent: Apply professional styling, themes, and visual presets to draw.io diagrams

entries.name: drawio:template
entries.intent: Generate diagrams from intelligent templates with auto-populated content
